title: Migrate API gateway to OpenTelemetry tracing
author: sahib
description: Replaces our home-grown tracing layer with OpenTelemetry across the shared API gateway. Adds context-propagation, sampling config per route, and a tail-based sampler for slow requests. Latency overhead well under 1ms p99. Zero impact to the fraud-scoring path (rayan reviewed for the latency budget). Migrated 23 downstream services off the old SDK in follow-up PRs.

title: New CLI: `platform-cli scaffold` for service bootstrapping
author: sahib
description: Internal CLI that scaffolds a new service from our golden-path template (TypeScript, OTel, CI/CD wired, Helm chart, on-call config stub). Cuts time-to-first-deploy for a new service from ~2 days to ~30 min. Adopted by 5 teams in the first two weeks.

title: Parallelize test stages and cache node_modules between jobs
author: sahib
description: Reduced average CI wall time across the monorepo from 18 min → 7 min. Parallelized test stages by package, added a shared node_modules cache keyed on the root lockfile hash, and dropped a redundant lint job that was duplicating work the pre-commit hook already does.
